title: (Bullish Signal) RADA, enters Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on Apr 29, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that RADA's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 96 similar cases where RADA's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 86 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 90%. Current price $13.26 crossed the support line at $12.75 and is trading between $14.90 resistance and $12.75 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/29/21 - 04/29/21, the price experienced a +21% Uptrend. During the week of 04/22/21 - 04/29/21, the stock enjoyed a +8% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/9v5wfg0vacw61.png?width=1524&format=png&auto=webp&s=a60de79ee41bc0fab7d3761828a89a013384214d

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 48 of 59 cases where RADA's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on April 29, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on RADA as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 86 of 96 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 90%.

Following a +1.55% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where RADA advanced for three days, in 222 of 255 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 87%.
